name: tool-gates
description: Intelligent permission gate for all Claude Code tools. AST-parses Bash commands, guards file reads/writes, and blocks dangerous tool invocations. Defers benign asks to CC's resolver so the prompt UI shows the 'Yes, and don't ask again for X' button, while keeping a deny floor for dangerous patterns. Tracks one-time approvals so they can be batch-promoted to permanent rules later.
